news.headline: Canada's PM Trudeau is to shuffle the cabinet on Friday - Government Official.
Elevation Gold (TSXV: ELVT.H) gets Canadian approval for sale agreement made on Dec 2, 2024.

news.headline: Egress, a KnowBe4 Company, named Leader in Gartner's Magic Quadrant for Email Security Platforms in 2024 for innovative AI-enabled security.
news.summary: Egress, a subsidiary of KnowBe4, has received recognition as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Email Security Platforms. This acknowledgment highlights Egress' strong performance in terms of Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision. The company stands out due to its innovative approach in combating advanced inbound phishing attacks and behavior-based outbound data breaches. The increasing importance of email security is evident, with a surge in technology development to address these threats. Egress continues to be at the forefront of this industry, showcasing its commitment to providing superior email security solutions.

news.summary: A small number of initiatives in the brief existence of cryptocurrency have significantly impacted and influenced the community, with consequences that could be either positive or negative.

news.headline: Influencer Hailey Welch's Hawk Tuah meme coin partners are being sued in a new federal lawsuit over the crypto disaster.
news.summary: Legal challenges have arisen for the developers of the Hawk Tuah cryptocurrency, promoted by social media influencer Haliey Welch, after a new federal lawsuit was recently filed against them.

news.headline: Malwarebytes enhances corporate team in Santa Clara on Dec. 19, 2024, to drive growth and expansion in global cyber protection.
news.summary: Santa Clara, California - On December 19, 2024, Malwarebytes, a renowned provider of real-time cyber protection, revealed the appointment of new executives to oversee the growth and expansion of its corporate business unit. With these additions, the company aims to strengthen its go-to-market strategies for corporate clients. The move underscores Malwarebytes' commitment to enhancing its presence in the corporate sector.

news.headline: Tropical Smoothie Cafe selects Horizon Media to boost brand visibility and growth across key markets. NY, Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: A prominent fast-casual company has partnered with Horizon Media to enhance brand exposure and boost customer interaction in important regions. Tropical Smoothie Cafe, the largest smoothie chain in the country and a frontrunner in the fast-casual sector, announced the collaboration on Dec. 19, 2024 in New York. This move aims to strengthen the brand's presence and engagement with customers in key markets.

news.headline: FDA updates definition of "healthy" nutrient content claim to address diet-related diseases in the U.S. - Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland on December 19, 2024, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) disclosed a new rule altering the meaning of the nutrition claim "healthy." This decision comes amidst a rising concern over preventable, diet-related chronic illnesses in the United States. The FDA's final rule addresses this issue and aims to provide clarity on what constitutes a "healthy" food product. This move is seen as a significant step towards tackling the increasing prevalence of diet-related health issues across the country.

news.headline: Certify Canine, Inc. launches new certification and insurance standards for working dogs, aiming to empower and support them.
news.summary: Certify Canine, Inc., based in MESA, Arizona, made a significant announcement on December 19, 2024. The company is devoted to assisting service, therapy, and facility dogs and has officially launched its certification program. With a focus on accountability and accessibility, the program aims to empower and support working dogs. This initiative marks a milestone in enhancing the recognition and training of these essential animals.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs analyst expects Block's EPS growth, with $102 price target, targeting Rule of 40 performance by 2026.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst, Will Nance, has reaffirmed a Buy rating for Block, Inc. (NYSE: SQ) with a target price of $102. Nance conducted a call with Block's investor relations team, confirming the company's commitment to achieving Rule of 40 performance by 2026. This includes expecting mid-teens gross profit growth, margin expansion, and GPV acceleration in 2025. Since the election, SQ's stock has seen a surge due to its exposure to small and medium businesses, pro-cyclical trends, deregulation, and involvement in the crypto market, all while maintaining an attractive valuation. Nance is positive about the company's future, predicting that investments in go-to-market strategies and products will enhance Seller results.

news.headline: Fed bids for 5-year TIPS total $216.4 mln.
Roche-Prothena's Parkinson's trial misses primary endpoint, but shows potential clinical benefits in Phase 2b PADOVA study. 586 subjects.
news.summary: Prothena Corporation plc (NASDAQ:PRTA) recently disclosed findings from the Phase 2b PADOVA trial of prasinezumab for early-stage Parkinson’s disease. The study, led by partner Roche Holdings AG (OTC:RHHBY), involved 586 participants with early-stage Parkinson’s disease who had received at least 18 months of stable symptomatic treatment. The results indicated a promising clinical impact in the primary endpoint of time to confirmed motor... Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US stocks edge up after Fed meeting; S&P 500 rises 0.5% recovering from a 3% selloff, while Nasdaq 100 gains 0.3%. Bond yields surge. Fed Chair Powell's cautious tone on rate cuts in 2024 leaves investors cautious. Dow Jones attempts to break 10-day losing streak. Investors brace for Friday's November inflation report.
news.summary: Following a tumultuous Federal Reserve meeting, Wall Street grappled with Fed Chair Jerome Powell's cautious outlook on interest rate cuts in 2024. This news led investors to consider the implications of potentially prolonged higher interest rates, despite the economy showing resilience. Despite these concerns, stock markets managed to stabilize, with the S&P 500 rising 0.5% after a significant 3% drop the previous day - the largest since September 2022. The Dow Jones Industrial Average also gained 0.4%, aiming to break a ten-day losing streak, its longest since 1974, while the Nasdaq 100 rose by 0.3%. Market sentiment remains cautious as investors await the release of the November inflation report, a vital factor in the Fed's future policy decisions. This report could either affirm the Fed's current stance on interest rates or provide optimism for a different approach.

news.headline: Global report predicts AI in Construction market to hit $12.1 billion by 2030, with a growth rate of 31%.
news.summary: A report on Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Construction has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global market for AI in Construction was valued at approximately US$1.8 billion in 2023 and is anticipated to grow to around US$12.1 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 31.0% during the forecast period from 2023 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market trends, key drivers, and future forecasts to assist in making well-informed decisions.

news.headline: Spartan Capital forecasts 2.25% - 2.50% U.S. economic growth in 2025 with inflation above 2%, caution in financial markets.
news.summary: In New York on December 19, 2024, Spartan Capital Securities, LLC, through its Chief Market Economist Peter Cardillo, released the 2025 Economic Outlook, forecasting moderate growth for the U.S. economy with an expected range of 2.25% - 2.50%. Inflation is projected to remain above the Federal Reserve's target of 2%, potentially impacting living costs and dampening consumer confidence and spending. Despite these concerns, Cardillo notes cautious optimism due to the Federal Reserve's successful avoidance of a recession. The report, based on analysis of market performance, macroeconomic trends, and sector data, is eagerly awaited by investors, analysts, and the media.

news.headline: Binah Capital Group CEO Craig Gould (NASDAQ: BCG) makes InvestmentNews Hot List for leadership and contributions.
news.summary: Craig Gould, the Chief Executive Officer of Binah Capital Group, was recently honored for his exceptional leadership and contributions in the financial industry. The prestigious InvestmentNews Hot List has acknowledged Gould for his outstanding achievements. Binah Capital Group is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BCG. news.summary: In Fullerton, California on December 19, 2024, ODK Media, Inc., a leading company in North America's Korean streaming market, has revealed its collaboration with LG Electronics to introduce Amasian TV channels on LG Channels. The initial launch will take place in the United States and Canada. This partnership marks a significant milestone for ODK Media, as it expands its reach to LG's platform, providing audiences in the U.S. and Canada with access to the popular Korean content.

news.summary: Legal issues have arisen for the developers of the Hawk Tuah meme coin, led by influencer Hailey Welch, as they are being sued in federal court.

news.headline: Hydrolix's partner ecosystem grows, utilizes platform for real-time queries at terabyte-scale, cost-effectively.
news.summary: Hydrolix, a streaming data lake company based in Portland, Oregon, revealed today that their platform has been utilized by partners to achieve real-time query performance at terabyte-scale. The news, dated December 19, 2024, showcases Hydrolix's innovative approach in transforming the world of big data analytics.

news.headline: Importance of consistent R&D: Focus on innovation for success
Asante Gold Corp. in Vancouver partners with Fujairah for US$500M gold sale, providing US$100M financing over 2 years.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Dec. 19, 2024, Asante Gold Corporation revealed that its subsidiary, Asante Gold Bibiani Ltd., has signed a deal with Fujairah Holdings LLC for the advance sale of $500 million in gold. news.headline: STEP Energy Services Ltd. delays special meeting to 5:00 PM MT today; shareholder votes indicate Arrangement defeat.
news.summary: STEP Energy Services Ltd. has delayed its special shareholders' meeting from 10:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. today due to changes in votes. The meeting was initially set for December 19, 2024, in Calgary. The company stated that the Arrangement would likely be voted against as per the latest count. Some shareholders have altered or retracted their votes, leading to this decision.

news.headline: Idrive Global rebrands as IdriveAI after record-breaking 2024 in AI telematics. CEO excited for future plans.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, 2024 has proven to be a productive year for Idrive, showcasing its commitment to artificial intelligence (AI) in the vehicle telematics sector. Undergoing a rebranding, Idrive Global is now known as IdriveAI, underscoring its expanding role in the industry. Sean O'Neil, CEO of IdriveAI, expressed enthusiasm for this evolution, noting, "We have been dedicated to AI for quite some time, and this change is a significant step forward. We are eager to unveil our upcoming initiatives." The year commenced on a high note for Idrive, as it presented its AI technology at CES, setting the pace for its future endeavors.

news.headline: J.D. Hupp appointed as Levata's first Chief Commercial Officer overseeing all commercial operations.
news.summary: Levata, a prominent provider of integrated technology solutions for enterprise mobility, barcoding, and access control, has recently named J.D. Hupp as its inaugural Chief Commercial Officer. The appointment was made public on December 19, 2024. Hupp will be responsible for managing all commercial activities within the company.

EECU, a major Texas credit union, achieves $4 billion in assets, marking a significant milestone after 90 years.

news.headline: Semiconductor cybersecurity market report identifies key trends from 2024-2034, focusing on AI, machine learning, quantum-safe cryptography, secure designs, and zero-trust architecture - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A report titled "Semiconductor Cybersecurity Market: Global and Regional Analysis" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for Semiconductor Cybersecurity is gaining importance due to the rising need for secure, high-performance semiconductor chips. This demand is escalating alongside the increasing number of connected devices and the advancement of Internet of Things (IoT) technology. The analysis covers the period from 2024 to 2034, focusing on aspects such as application, deployment type, solution, security type, and region. This growth reflects the significance of cybersecurity in the semiconductor industry, with global market figures indicating a surge in market value.

news.headline: Wall Street watches eagerly as key Fed inflation report looms, with PCE price index expected to climb 2.5% y/y in Nov 2024, up from 2.3% in Oct. Fed's 2% inflation target exceeded. Core PCE likely to rise to 2.9% y/y, while monthly basis slows down to 0.2% from 0.3%. Persistent inflationary pressures catalyze hawkish narrative.
news.summary: The impending release of the Personal Consumption Expenditure (PCE) price index on Friday is anticipated to play a vital role in market recovery post a sharp sell-off, catalyzed by the Federal Reserve's December meeting. Economists project a climb in the PCE price index to 2.5% year-over-year in November 2024, up from 2.3% in October, showing a monthly 0.2% increase - highlighting an annualized rate of inflation exceeding the Federal Reserve's 2% target. The Core PCE, excluding volatile food and energy prices, is expected to marginally rise from 2.8% to 2.9% year-over-year in November, also with a monthly 0.2% increase. These numbers, especially the rising inflation rates, have led to concerns around market recovery and the Federal Reserve's stance on inflation.

news.headline: Baskin-Robbins returns to Alberta after 7 years with new shop in Calgary's Southcentre Mall, 6th in expansion deal.
news.summary: A new Baskin-Robbins shop has recently opened in Calgary's Southcentre Mall, marking the brand's return to Alberta after a hiatus of seven years. This latest establishment is the sixth of its kind to open as part of a strategic partnership between Baskin-Robbins and McMaster Group Holdings, aimed at expanding into the Vancouver and Calgary markets. The franchisee of the newly launched location is Adel Ashry, who heads McMaster Group Holdings and boasts over twenty years of experience in franchising.

news.headline: $70,000 donated to 6 PA nonprofits by FirstEnergy Foundation for holiday campaign.
news.summary: As part of its yearly holiday philanthropic campaign, the FirstEnergy Foundation in Greensburg, Pennsylvania, has generously provided surprise donations known as "Gifts of the Season" worth a combined total of $70,000. These donations have been awarded to six local Pennsylvania nonprofit organizations dedicated to enhancing the community.

news.headline: YSX TECH. CO., LTD closes IPO of 1,250,000 shares at $4.00 each, raising $5,000,000 before expenses. Shares trade on Nasdaq.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, YSX TECH. CO., LTD (YSXT) completed its initial public offering (IPO) of 1,250,000 Class A ordinary shares at $4.00 per share, generating around $5,000,000 in total gross proceeds, excluding underwriting discounts and other expenses. The offering, which began trading on Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "YSXT" on December 18, 2024, involved the Cayman Islands-based company and its entities in China that offer business solutions predominantly to insurance firms and brokerages in the country.

news.headline: Hoffmann Green Cement expands globally with new licensing deal in UK and Ireland with Cemblend Ltd. #sustainability #construction
news.summary: In France, Hoffmann Green Cement Technologies (ISIN: FR0013451044, Ticker: ALHGR) has signed a significant licensing deal with UK partner Cemblend Ltd. This move is part of the company's commitment to reducing carbon emissions in construction by offering innovative clinker-free cements. The strategic agreement marks a key milestone in their global expansion strategy, underlining the company's position in the market. The partnership aims to further advance their mission and increase their presence internationally.

news.headline: AGCO boosts long-term targets, sets 2025 outlook at analyst meeting. Focus on farmers and shareholders.
news.summary: AGCO Corporation (NYSE: AGCO) has adopted a Farmer-First strategy that is proving successful by delivering value for farmers and providing higher through-the-cycle returns for shareholders. As a global leader in agricultural machinery and precision agriculture, AGCO's approach has yielded positive results. This approach prioritizes the needs and interests of farmers while also ensuring profitable returns for shareholders. The strategy is showing promising results and is setting a strong foundation for the company's future growth.

news.headline: Aqua PA replaces lead pipes at 1,000 locations in 62 municipalities across Pennsylvania, improving water quality.
news.summary: In Bryn Mawr, Pennsylvania, Aqua Pennsylvania has successfully replaced customer-owned lead and galvanized service lines at 1,000 properties across the state within a year. This initiative has greatly benefitted customers in 62 municipalities by upgrading the infrastructure. Customer-owned service lines, which run from the curb to buildings, were the focus of this project. Aqua, a water treatment company, continues to prioritize providing safe drinking water to communities.

news.headline: OsteoStrong to be featured in documentary Biohack Yourself on Amazon Prime Video, premiering Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Las Vegas, OsteoStrong, a prominent company specializing in skeletal strength conditioning, revealed its inclusion in the upcoming documentary "Biohack Yourself." The documentary is scheduled to debut on Amazon Prime Video and is expected to engage viewers with innovative insights into enhancing one's health and wellness.

news.headline: Kerrigan Advisors sells Country Buick GMC of Leesburg to Jaffer Syed, 80th franchise sold in 2024, 54th in Mid-Atlantic region, 284th since 2014.
news.summary: In Washington, Kerrigan Advisors, a leading sell-side advisor for auto dealers nationwide, facilitated the sale of Country Buick GMC of Leesburg in Loudoun County, Northern Virginia, to Jaffer Syed. This marks the 80th franchise sold by Kerrigan Advisors in 2024, with the transaction being the 54th franchise sold in the Mid-Atlantic region and the 284th dealership deal since 2014.

news.headline: Entergy Texas declares quarterly dividend of $0.3359375 per share on its Series A Preferred Stock, payable Jan. 15, 2025.
news.summary: In The Woodlands, Texas, on December 19, 2024, the board of directors of Entergy Texas, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.3359375 per share for its Series A Preferred Stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on January 15, 2025, to shareholders holding stock as of January 3, 2025.

news.headline: Mutual of America Foundation awarded 6 nonprofits the 2024 Community Partnership Award, celebrating 29 years of excellence.
news.summary: The Mutual of America Foundation recently revealed the winners of its prestigious 2024 Community Partnership Award, which celebrates its 29th year. Six noteworthy nonprofit organizations were chosen for their exceptional contributions to the community...

news.headline: OUR RESCUE expands global mission with new leadership team members; Derek Benner joins as Chief Mission Officer.
news.summary: Derek Benner, the ex-leader of Homeland Security Investigations, has been appointed as the Chief Mission Officer for OUR RESCUE, an international NGO aiding victims of sex trafficking and child exploitation. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, in Minneapolis. OUR RESCUE works globally to rescue and assist survivors, with a significant impact on fighting these crimes.

news.headline: Over 430 Teamsters at Sysco Houston vote to strike as company refuses fair contract. 400+ workers ready for picket line.
news.summary: Over 430 employees, including drivers, warehouse workers, and mechanics represented by Teamsters Local 988, are gearing up to go on strike as Sysco has refused to provide a fair contract. The workers are preparing to form a picket line to protest the company's actions.

news.headline: Dr. Soroush Baghdadi joins Luskin Orthopaedic Institute in LA as a pediatric orthopaedic surgeon.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the Luskin Orthopaedic Institute for Children (LuskinOIC) has announced the addition of Dr. Soroush Baghdadi to their team of pediatric orthopaedic specialists. Dr. Baghdadi brings extensive international experience and research background to the institute, having obtained his medical degree from Tehran University of Medical Sciences. His expertise will contribute significantly to advancing pediatric orthopaedic care and improving the health of children. This addition underscores LuskinOIC's commitment to providing quality orthopaedic services.

news.headline: Old Glory Bank offers limited chance to buy Class B Voting Common Stock of Old Glory Holding Company under Reg A (Tier II).
news.summary: Elmore City, Oklahoma – Old Glory Bank revealed that they are offering Americans the chance to acquire ownership in Old Glory Holding Company through the purchase of Class B Voting Common Stock. This opportunity allows individuals to buy fully tradeable shares under Regulation A (Tier II). As part of their effort to maintain ownership by Main Street instead of Wall Street, the bank has seen remarkable growth in 2023 and 2024. This initiative aims to involve freedom-loving Americans in the mission of Old Glory Bank.

news.headline: AFA renewed GSA schedule for another 5 years, providing government agencies with streamlined access to Mitchell Institute.
news.summary: AFA headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, shared on Dec. 19, 2024, that its GSA schedule listing has been renewed for five years. This allows government agencies easy access to Mitchell with the latest advancements in air and space technologies.

news.headline: Sanctuary AI introduces new tactile sensors for robots, improving touch, speed, and success rates. VANCOUVER, BC, Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: Cutting-edge tactile sensor technology has revolutionized the capabilities of general purpose robots by enhancing their speed and success rate. Through the integration of haptics, these robots now have the ability to handle larger volumes and generate more detailed data, resulting in superior performance levels for embodied AI models. This advancement was made by Sanctuary AI, a Vancouver-based company, on December 19, 2024.
